title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out with Inari One...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, lookie there! That's those Cuties everyone's
ravin' about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look in the direction Inari One is pointing and
see a claw machine filled with Umamusume
plushies.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
They all look so adorable. I jus' wanna scoop 'em
all up.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Not too good with this kinda game though, sadly.
When it comes to festival fishin' games, I can reel
prizes in all day!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh-ho! I like your spirit, Boss! You're confident,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh-ho! I like your spirit, Boss! You're confident,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Then let's see what ya got. Don't let me down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
